name: Baked Sea Bass with Black-Olive Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs sea bass fillets (4 to 6 pieces)
1/2 cup vegetable stock OR dry white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the garlic, olives, oregano, basil, and parsley.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Heat the olive oil in a 13x9-inch glass baking dish at 425°F for 1 minute.
4. Spread the olive mixture evenly over the bottom of the baking dish.
5. Arrange the sea bass fillets on top (skin side up).
6. Pour the vegetable stock or dry white wine around the fillets.
7. Bake, basting occasionally with juices, for 15 minutes or until done.
8. Serve the fillets and olive mixture arranged on heated serving plates.
Makes 4 servings. Each serving contains about: 361 calories; 393 mg sodium; 145 mg cholesterol; 17 grams fat; 2 grams carbohydrates; 33 grams protein; 0.07 gram fiber.
